title: Junior .NET Developer
description_text: Example Software Labs is seeking a Junior .NET Developer to help build and maintain internal business applications used by operations, customer support, and reporting teams. In this role, you will work with senior engineers to develop backend services in C# and ASP.NET Core, write SQL queries, troubleshoot production issues, and contribute to API integrations between line-of-business systems. This is an early-career role suited to someone comfortable learning in a collaborative engineering environment.
raw_text: Junior .NET Developer - Example Software Labs - Appleton, WI - Hybrid. Build internal business applications with C#, ASP.NET Core, SQL Server, REST APIs, Git, and Agile practices. Early-career candidates are encouraged to apply.
requirements: Working knowledge of C# and the .NET ecosystem
Experience building or maintaining web applications or APIs
Basic SQL skills and comfort working with relational data
Ability to debug application issues and document findings
Strong communication skills and willingness to learn from senior engineers
preferred_qualifications: Exposure to ASP.NET Core or Entity Framework
Experience with SQL Server, PostgreSQL, or MySQL
Familiarity with TypeScript, Angular, or another frontend framework
Basic understanding of Docker or CI/CD pipelines
Internship, capstone, freelance, or personal project experience with backend development
responsibilities: Develop and maintain backend features for internal web applications
Write SQL queries and assist with data troubleshooting
Implement and test REST API endpoints
Participate in code reviews and Agile planning sessions
Document technical decisions, defects, and support procedures
Collaborate with product owners and senior developers to clarify requirements
notes: Placeholder sample job for local-first workflow development. Not a real posting.
